notes: 该项目为英国首个市场营销学系(创立于1964年)开设,获CIM认证学位。学费数字依据LUMS商学院统一费率推断,未逐页二次核实。

faculty: Lancaster University Management School (LUMS) - Department of Management Science
tuition: GBP 30,000/year (International, 2026 entry); GBP 16,270/year (Home)

requirements.undergrad_background: 2:2 Hons degree (UK or equivalent);官网原文强调'Marks should be consistently at 2:2 level throughout your undergraduate studies.'
requirements.china_university_list: 官网未公开逐校分档名单(见Finance MSc条目说明,全校统一标准)。
requirements.gpa_requirement: 本科需达UK 2:2水平且成绩需全程稳定,对应中国院校均分约70-80%(全校通用标准)
requirements.prerequisites: 明确要求量化方法背景,如数学、统计学、概率论、计量经济学、博弈论、数据分析、运筹学、仿真与商业建模等
requirements.work_experience: 非必需;部分院系奖学金将'行业经验'列为优先考虑因素(非申请硬性要求)

deadlines.notes: 采取滚动录取,无固定截止日期;当前(2026-07-20)开放申请的是2026年入学季,2027年入学申请将于2026年9月开放。

notes: 对量化背景要求明显高于同校其他商科硕士项目。

requirements.undergrad_background: 官网原文:'2:2 honours degree from a UK university, or an equivalent academic qualification from a similar non-UK institution. This degree should include at least eight modules in Accounting and/or Finance at 2:1 level.' 专业资格(ACA、CPA、ACCA、CIMA)也被纳入考量
requirements.china_university_list: 官网未公开按院校命名的分档名单(无Band A/B/C结构),仅有通用表述(该文字通过校方国家/地区选择器动态注入所有课程页面):'taught master's applications with a bachelor's degree from a recognised Chinese university, with overall average academic grades between 65% to 78% (depending on the level/tier of Chinese university), will be considered... Some of our courses do require higher entry requirements.' 未发现本项目对该区间的差异化上调。
